hardware_measurement_required: hardware run must return accepted schedule count and reject overflow cleanly
hardware run must report context slot high-water mark

detection_rule: route/memory slots per core <= source limits
hardware_measurement_required: hardware run must report route/memory slot high-water marks

detection_rule: max pending and in-flight replies <= min(MAX_PENDING_HORIZONS, MAX_LOOKUP_REPLIES)
hardware_measurement_required: hardware run must report pending high-water mark, lookup replies, and overflow counters

detection_rule: preflight can only declare MCPL-first message counts
hardware_measurement_required: hardware run must return request/reply parity, stale, duplicate, timeout, and drop counters

detection_rule: compact_readback_bytes_per_snapshot is projected for each point
hardware_measurement_required: hardware run must return per-core payload lengths and cumulative readback bytes

detection_rule: all replicated profile copies use profiles with positive per-core headroom
hardware_measurement_required: any new profile build must return size/headroom before promotion
must be handled by a separate inter-chip contract before first multi-chip smoke
